# Schedule of Benefits for Physician Services under the Health Insurance Act

> **Source**: http://www.health.gov.on.ca/english/providers/program/ohip/sob/physserv/physserv_mn.html
> **Fetched**: 2026-04-29 (via Wayback Machine snapshot 2016-08-26 — most recent successful 200 capture; the live MOH HTTPS endpoint is currently returning HTTP 502 from this network and the legacy `/english/providers/...` path was discontinued before 2017)
> **Format**: HTML page captured via Wayback Machine and reformatted as Markdown. Layout simplified.
> **Authoritative source**: the live page at the URL above. If this MD and the page disagree, the live page wins. The current Schedule of Benefits hub on the live MOH site is https://www.health.gov.on.ca/en/pro/programs/ohip/sob/ — that page supersedes this snapshot for the purpose of locating the most recent SOB PDF.

## Schedule of Benefits for Physician Services under the Health Insurance Act

> **This information requires knowledgeable interpretation and is intended primarily for members of the professional health care community.**

### Schedule of Benefits Effective April 1, 2016

[Physician Services Under the Health Insurance Act](http://www.health.gov.on.ca/english/providers/program/ohip/sob/physserv/sob_master20160406.pdf) (April 1, 2016, as most recently amended December 22, 2015)

Some Schedules are provided in Portable Document Format (PDF | 7.88 Mb). To view and print the Schedules, you need to have Adobe Acrobat Reader installed on your computer.

### For more information

Call the ministry **INFOline** at 1-866-532-3161 (Toll-free in Ontario only), TTY 1-800-387-5559. Hours of operation: 8:30am - 5:00pm.

Email your comments and general inquiries to: Corporate Administrative Services, Health Services Division (CLUHID@moh.gov.on.ca).

### Disclaimer

The content of this website is provided for information only. No assurance is given that the content is current or accurate. Users are cautioned against relying upon it without making reference to the regulation in effect defining the Schedule of Benefits as it is published from time to time pursuant to Ontario Regulation 552 under the **Health Insurance Act**.
